_publications._publicationTitle: p21-Activated kinases are required for transformation in a cell-based model of neurofibromatosis type 2.

_contextSnippet: Expression of the PID, but not the control PID LF, showed substantial restoration of normal morphology...expression of PID, but not PID LF, significantly inhibited the invasive capacity
details: PID expression substantially restored normal morphology in Merlin ΔBB cells and significantly inhibited their invasive capacity
